prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言特朗普将成为总统
prophecies.a: 「有一个人此刻正在白宫的走廊和大门边上徘徊。上帝说：我将把我的灵放在那个人身上。他的名字叫特朗普。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied Trump would become president
prophecies.a_en: "There is a man who is lingering by the corridors and the gates of the White House right now. God says, I will put My Spirit upon that man. His name is Trump."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2016年11月8日，唐纳德·特朗普当选美国第45任总统。克莱门特早在2006年就公开预言此事，当时特朗普尚未有从政迹象。该预言录像存档于其官方事工网站。
prophecies.verdict_en: On November 8, 2016, Donald Trump was elected as the 45th President of the United States. Clement publicly prophesied this as early as 2006, years before Trump showed any political ambitions. The prophecy recording is archived on his official ministry website.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言媒体的敌意
prophecies.a: 「媒体将对这位总统发起前所未有的攻击。他们将扭曲真相，制造谎言。但真相终将大白。」
prophecies.a_en: "The media will launch unprecedented attacks against this president. They will distort truth and fabricate lies. But the truth will eventually prevail."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 特朗普执政期间确实面临了主流媒体的大规模批评性报道。皮尤研究中心的分析显示，特朗普获得的负面报道比例远超前任总统。但「扭曲真相」和「制造谎言」的指控是一种主观判断。
prophecies.verdict_en: Trump did face massive critical coverage from mainstream media during his presidency. Pew Research Center analysis showed Trump received far more negative coverage than previous presidents. However, characterizing coverage as 'distorting truth' and 'fabricating lies' is a subjective judgment.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言房地产市场变化
prophecies.a: 「上帝告诉我，房地产将经历一次大震动。但之后将有一个比以往更大的复苏。那些在震动中持守的人将得到丰厚的回报。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied real estate market shifts
prophecies.a_en: "God told me, real estate will go through a great shaking. But afterwards, there will be a recovery greater than before. Those who hold firm through the shaking will be greatly rewarded."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2008年次贷危机导致美国房地产市场崩溃，房价暴跌约30%。但此后房价强势回升，2012年开始复苏，至2020年代房价已远超危机前水平。「大震动」和「更大复苏」的预言准确。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 2008 subprime mortgage crisis caused the US real estate market to collapse, with prices dropping about 30%. However, prices recovered strongly, beginning in 2012, and by the 2020s had far exceeded pre-crisis levels. The 'great shaking' and 'greater recovery' prophecy proved accurate.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言美国将出现两任总统
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，我将为这个国家放置两任总统。两任总统。要记住这一点。不要害怕。我告诉你，特朗普将成为一个号角。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied two presidents for America
prophecies.a_en: "God says, I will place for this nation two presidents. Two presidents. Take note of this. Do not be afraid. I tell you, Trump shall become a trumpet."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 特朗普于2016年当选第45任总统，2024年再次当选第47任总统。克莱门特的追随者认为这里的「两任总统」指的是特朗普的两次当选（中间被拜登隔开），而非连续两届。
prophecies.verdict_en: Trump was elected as the 45th president in 2016 and again as the 47th president in 2024. Clement's followers interpret 'two presidents' as Trump's two non-consecutive terms (separated by Biden), rather than two consecutive terms.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言癌症将被治愈
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，我将赐下一种治愈癌症的药方。一种全新的治疗方式将从以色列兴起，癌症将被彻底征服。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied a cure for cancer
prophecies.a_en: "God says, I will give a cure for cancer. A brand new healing method shall arise from Israel, and cancer shall be completely conquered."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年初，癌症尚未被「彻底征服」，但以色列确实在癌症治疗领域取得重大进展。以色列生物技术公司在免疫疗法和个性化医学方面处于全球前沿，mRNA疫苗技术也被用于癌症治疗试验。预言中「完全治愈」的部分尚未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of early 2026, cancer has not been 'completely conquered', but Israel has indeed made significant advances in cancer treatment. Israeli biotech companies are at the global forefront of immunotherapy and personalized medicine, and mRNA vaccine technology is being used in cancer treatment trials. The 'complete cure' aspect remains unfulfilled.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言能源领域的突破
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，美国将发现新的能源资源。石油将从意想不到的地方涌出。这个国家将不再依赖中东的石油。」
prophecies.a_en: "God says, America will discover new energy resources. Oil will gush from unexpected places. This nation shall no longer depend on Middle Eastern oil."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 美国页岩油革命在2010年代使美国成为全球最大产油国。2019年美国实现了70年来首次能源净出口，大幅减少了对中东石油的依赖。「意想不到的地方涌出石油」准确描述了页岩油开采技术的突破。
prophecies.verdict_en: The US shale oil revolution in the 2010s made America the world's largest oil producer. In 2019, the US achieved net energy exports for the first time in 70 years, dramatically reducing dependence on Middle Eastern oil. 'Oil gushing from unexpected places' accurately describes the shale extraction breakthrough.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言美国经济将经历复兴
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，一个巨大的经济转变即将到来。股市将升到前所未有的高度。美元将重新变得强大。不要听那些说末日的人。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied an economic revival in America
prophecies.a_en: "God says, a great economic shift is coming. The stock market shall reach unprecedented heights. The dollar shall become strong again. Do not listen to those who speak of doom."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2010年代美国股市确实经历了历史性牛市，道琼斯指数从约10,000点升至2020年初的近30,000点。但2020年3月因新冠疫情股市暴跌，随后在大规模刺激政策下反弹创新高。预言整体方向正确，但「不会有末日」的说法忽略了期间的剧烈波动。
prophecies.verdict_en: The US stock market did experience a historic bull run in the 2010s, with the Dow rising from about 10,000 to nearly 30,000 by early 2020. However, markets crashed in March 2020 due to COVID-19, then rebounded to new highs with massive stimulus. The overall direction was correct, but the 'no doom' framing overlooked significant volatility.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言中东和平进程
prophecies.a: 「我看见中东出现一个突破。以色列与阿拉伯国家之间将有和平协议。那些过去敌对的人将握手。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied Middle East peace process
prophecies.a_en: "I see a breakthrough in the Middle East. There will be peace agreements between Israel and Arab nations. Those who were once hostile will shake hands."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年9月，以色列与阿联酋、巴林签署《亚伯拉罕协议》，实现关系正常化。随后苏丹和摩洛哥也加入。这是数十年来中东最重大的外交突破之一，「过去敌对的人握手」的描述准确。
prophecies.verdict_en: In September 2020, Israel signed the Abraham Accords with the UAE and Bahrain, normalizing relations. Sudan and Morocco later joined. This was one of the most significant Middle East diplomatic breakthroughs in decades, accurately matching the description of 'hostile parties shaking hands'.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言全球将经历属灵觉醒
prophecies.a: 「一场大复兴将席卷美国和全世界。年轻人将引领这场运动。上帝说，我将倾倒我的灵在万民身上。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied a global spiritual awakening
prophecies.a_en: "A great revival will sweep across America and the whole world. Young people will lead this movement. God says, I will pour out My Spirit upon all flesh."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年2月，阿斯伯里大学（Asbury University）爆发了大规模复兴运动，持续超过两周，吸引了数万人参加，并引发全美多所大学的连锁反应。参与者以年轻人为主。但「席卷全世界」的规模尚未达到。
prophecies.verdict_en: In February 2023, a major revival broke out at Asbury University, lasting over two weeks and attracting tens of thousands of participants, triggering similar events at multiple US universities. Participants were predominantly young people. However, the 'sweeping the whole world' scale has not been reached.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言美元将走强
prophecies.a: 「不要听那些唱衰美元的人。上帝说，美元将不会崩溃。美国的货币将在全球保持领导地位。那些做空美元的人将被羞耻。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied the strength of the US dollar
prophecies.a_en: "Do not listen to those who speak against the dollar. God says the dollar will not collapse. America's currency shall maintain global leadership. Those who short the dollar shall be put to shame."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年初，美元依然是全球储备货币，美元指数在2022-2024年间多次创出二十年新高。尽管多年来不断有「美元崩溃」的预测，美元始终保持了全球领导地位。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of early 2026, the US dollar remains the global reserve currency, with the Dollar Index hitting 20-year highs multiple times during 2022-2024. Despite years of 'dollar collapse' predictions, the dollar has maintained global leadership.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言以色列的安全
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，以色列将经受攻击，但不会被摧毁。敌人将从四面八方涌来，但我的手将保护这片土地。以色列将变得比以前更强大。」
prophecies.a_en: "God says Israel will endure attacks but will not be destroyed. Enemies will come from all sides, but My hand will protect this land. Israel will become stronger than before."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年10月7日，哈马斯对以色列发动大规模突袭，造成约1200人死亡。以色列随后发动军事反击，冲突持续至今。「经受攻击但不被摧毁」的描述基本准确，但「变得更强大」存在争议——以色列军事上取得进展，但国际形象和社会凝聚力受到冲击。
prophecies.verdict_en: On October 7, 2023, Hamas launched a major attack on Israel, killing about 1,200 people. Israel responded with a military offensive that continues to this day. The description of 'enduring attacks but not being destroyed' is broadly accurate, but 'becoming stronger' is debatable — Israel made military gains but suffered damage to its international image and social cohesion.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言特朗普将面临弹劾攻击
prophecies.a: 「他们将尝试弹劾他。但上帝说，这不会成功。他们会大声呼喊弹劾，弹劾！但这对他不起作用。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied impeachment attempts against Trump
prophecies.a_en: "They will try to impeach him. But God says, it will not succeed. They will shout, impeach, impeach! But it will not work against him."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 特朗普分别于2019年12月和2021年1月遭到两次弹劾，但参议院均未通过定罪，弹劾未能将其免职。克莱门特早在2014年即预言了弹劾尝试及其最终失败。
prophecies.verdict_en: Trump was impeached twice — in December 2019 and January 2021 — but the Senate did not convict on either occasion, and he was not removed from office. Clement predicted the impeachment attempts and their ultimate failure as early as 2014.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言大规模流行病
prophecies.a: 「上帝对我说，将有一种疾病从东方来到。但不要恐惧。这将是一个暂时的事件，之后将有极大的喜乐临到。」
prophecies.a_en: "God said to me, there will be a disease coming from the East. But do not fear. This will be a temporary event, and afterwards great joy will come."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年新冠疫情（COVID-19）从中国武汉开始传播至全球，与「东方来的疾病」描述相符。但疫情持续超过三年，造成数百万人死亡，「暂时的事件」这一描述过于轻描淡写。「之后极大喜乐」的部分难以客观验证。
prophecies.verdict_en: The COVID-19 pandemic in 2020 spread globally from Wuhan, China, matching the 'disease from the East' description. However, the pandemic lasted over three years and killed millions, making 'temporary event' a significant understatement. The 'great joy afterwards' claim is difficult to objectively verify.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言最高法院将发生变化
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，我将把三个人放进最高法院。三个法官将被替换。天平将向公义的一方倾斜。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied changes in the Supreme Court
prophecies.a_en: "God says, I will place three people in the Supreme Court. Three justices shall be replaced. The scales will tip toward righteousness."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 特朗普在其首个总统任期内提名了三位最高法院大法官：尼尔·戈萨奇（2017年）、布雷特·卡瓦诺（2018年）和艾米·科尼·巴雷特（2020年）。这三次任命使最高法院向保守派倾斜，与预言描述一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: Trump appointed three Supreme Court justices during his first term: Neil Gorsuch (2017), Brett Kavanaugh (2018), and Amy Coney Barrett (2020). These three appointments shifted the Supreme Court toward a conservative majority, matching the prophecy's description.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言朝鲜局势变化
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，朝鲜将有一扇门打开。那个独裁者将被震动。我告诉你们，那片土地上将有改变。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied changes in North Korea
prophecies.a_en: "God says, a door will open in North Korea. That dictator will be shaken. I tell you, there will be change in that land."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2018年6月，金正恩与特朗普在新加坡举行历史性峰会，这确实是朝鲜外交史上前所未有的「门打开」。但「独裁者被震动」和「土地上的改变」并未根本实现——朝鲜政权依然稳固，核问题未解决，后续谈判陷入僵局。
prophecies.verdict_en: In June 2018, Kim Jong-un and Trump held a historic summit in Singapore — an unprecedented 'door opening' in North Korean diplomacy. However, 'the dictator being shaken' and 'change in that land' did not materialize fundamentally — the regime remains intact, nuclear issues are unresolved, and subsequent negotiations stalled.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言经济复苏
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，在特朗普执政期间，美国将经历前所未有的经济繁荣。股市将创新高，就业将增长。」
prophecies.a_en: "God says, during Trump's tenure, America will experience unprecedented economic prosperity. The stock market will reach new highs and employment will grow."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2017-2019年（COVID前），美国股市确实创下多项历史新高，失业率降至3.5%（50年最低）。标普500指数从2017年初的约2250点涨至2020年初的约3380点。
prophecies.verdict_en: From 2017-2019 (pre-COVID), US stock markets did reach multiple all-time highs, unemployment fell to 3.5% (50-year low). The S&P 500 rose from about 2,250 in early 2017 to about 3,380 in early 2020.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言以色列迁都耶路撒冷
prophecies.a: 「美国将承认耶路撒冷是以色列的首都。大使馆将被迁到耶路撒冷。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied Jerusalem as Israel's capital
prophecies.a_en: "America will recognize Jerusalem as Israel's capital. The embassy will be moved to Jerusalem."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2017年12月6日特朗普宣布承认耶路撒冷为以色列首都。2018年5月14日美国驻以色列大使馆正式迁至耶路撒冷。这是历史性的外交举措。
prophecies.verdict_en: On December 6, 2017, Trump recognized Jerusalem as Israel's capital. The US Embassy officially moved to Jerusalem on May 14, 2018. This was a historic diplomatic move.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言北朝鲜外交突破
prophecies.a: 「特朗普将与朝鲜领导人会面。没有人相信这会发生，但它将实现。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied North Korea diplomatic breakthrough
prophecies.a_en: "Trump will meet with the North Korean leader. No one believes this will happen, but it will."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2018年6月12日，特朗普与金正恩在新加坡举行历史性会晤——这是在任美国总统首次与朝鲜领导人会面。2019年两人又在河内和板门店会面。但无核化谈判最终未取得实质性进展。
prophecies.verdict_en: On June 12, 2018, Trump and Kim Jong Un held a historic summit in Singapore — the first meeting between a sitting US president and North Korean leader. They met again in Hanoi and Panmunjom in 2019. However, denuclearization talks ultimately made no substantive progress.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言能源独立
prophecies.a: 「美国将成为能源出口国。石油和天然气将大量流出美国，而不是流入。」
prophecies.a_en: "America will become an energy exporter. Oil and gas will flow out of America, not in."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2019年美国成为石油和石油产品的净出口国（自1952年以来首次）。页岩革命使美国成为全球最大的天然气和原油生产国。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2019, the US became a net exporter of petroleum and petroleum products (first time since 1952). The shale revolution made the US the world's largest producer of natural gas and crude oil.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言最高法院大法官任命
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，特朗普将任命多位最高法院大法官，改变法院的格局。这将影响美国数十年。」
prophecies.a_en: "God says, Trump will appoint multiple Supreme Court justices, changing the court's composition. This will affect America for decades."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 特朗普在第一任期内任命了三位最高法院大法官：尼尔·戈萨奇（2017）、布雷特·卡瓦诺（2018）和艾米·科尼·巴雷特（2020）。这使最高法院转向保守派多数，并导致2022年推翻了Roe v. Wade。
prophecies.verdict_en: Trump appointed three Supreme Court justices in his first term: Neil Gorsuch (2017), Brett Kavanaugh (2018), and Amy Coney Barrett (2020). This shifted the court to a conservative majority and led to overturning Roe v. Wade in 2022.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言弹劾但不会被罢免
prophecies.a: 「他们将试图弹劾特朗普，但不会成功。他将坚持到最后。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied impeachment but not removal
prophecies.a_en: "They will try to impeach Trump, but will not succeed. He will stand firm to the end."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 特朗普于2019年12月和2021年1月两次被众议院弹劾，但两次均被参议院宣判无罪。他确实「坚持到最后」——完成了第一任期。
prophecies.verdict_en: Trump was impeached by the House in December 2019 and January 2021, but was acquitted by the Senate both times. He did 'stand firm to the end' — completing his first term.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言中东和平协议
prophecies.a: 「特朗普将在中东实现突破性和平。以色列与阿拉伯国家将签署历史性协议。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied Middle East peace deal
prophecies.a_en: "Trump will achieve breakthrough peace in the Middle East. Israel and Arab nations will sign historic agreements."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年9月，以色列与阿联酋、巴林签署《亚伯拉罕协议》，实现关系正常化。此后苏丹和摩洛哥也加入。这确实是以色列与阿拉伯国家之间数十年来最重大的外交突破。
prophecies.verdict_en: In September 2020, Israel signed the Abraham Accords with UAE and Bahrain, normalizing relations. Sudan and Morocco subsequently joined. This was indeed the most significant diplomatic breakthrough between Israel and Arab states in decades.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言美国将经历种族冲突
prophecies.a: 「美国的城市将燃起火焰。种族之间的仇恨将被煽动。但上帝将赐下和平与和解。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied racial conflict in America
prophecies.a_en: "American cities will burn with fire. Hatred between races will be inflamed. But God will grant peace and reconciliation."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年5月乔治·弗洛伊德之死引发全美大规模抗议和骚乱，部分城市确实「燃起火焰」。但「和平与和解」尚未完全实现——种族紧张关系在2024年仍是美国社会的核心议题。
prophecies.verdict_en: George Floyd's death in May 2020 triggered massive protests and riots nationwide; some cities did 'burn with fire.' But 'peace and reconciliation' have not been fully achieved — racial tensions remain a core American social issue in 2024.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言教会将受到压力
prophecies.a: 「教会将面临来自政府和社会的压力。他们将试图让教会保持沉默。但信仰的声音不会被压制。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied pressure on the Church
prophecies.a_en: "The Church will face pressure from government and society. They will try to silence the Church. But the voice of faith will not be suppressed."
prophecies.verdict_zh: COVID-19期间许多地方政府限制了教会聚会。最高法院多次裁定某些限制措施违宪。此外，关于宗教自由与LGBTQ权利的文化冲突也构成了对传统教会的「压力」。但「压制信仰」的程度存在争议。
prophecies.verdict_en: During COVID-19, many local governments restricted church gatherings. The Supreme Court ruled several restrictions unconstitutional. Cultural conflicts over religious freedom vs. LGBTQ rights also created 'pressure' on traditional churches. But the extent of 'faith suppression' is debatable.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言最高法院推翻Roe v. Wade
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，最高法院将推翻堕胎法。生命将被重新尊重。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade
prophecies.a_en: "God says, the Supreme Court will overturn the abortion law. Life will be respected again."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2022年6月24日，美国最高法院在Dobbs案中推翻了Roe v. Wade判例（1973年确立的堕胎权），将堕胎立法权交还各州。这是美国宪政史上最重大的判例翻转之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: On June 24, 2022, the US Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade (1973 abortion rights precedent) in the Dobbs case, returning abortion legislation to states. This was one of the most significant precedent reversals in US constitutional history.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言COVID-19疫情期间的经济冲击
prophecies.a: 「一场瘟疫将冲击美国和世界。经济将受到严重打击，但上帝的手将使其迅速恢复。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied economic shock during pandemic
prophecies.a_en: "A plague will strike America and the world. The economy will be severely hit, but God's hand will bring swift recovery."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年COVID-19疫情导致全球经济衰退。美国GDP在2020年Q2暴跌31.4%（年化），失业率飙升至14.7%。但经济确实迅速反弹——2021年GDP增长5.7%，为近40年最高。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 2020 COVID-19 pandemic caused a global recession. US GDP plunged 31.4% (annualized) in Q2 2020, unemployment spiked to 14.7%. But the economy did recover swiftly — 2021 GDP grew 5.7%, the highest in nearly 40 years.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言大觉醒运动
prophecies.a: 「一场属灵的大觉醒将席卷美国。年轻人将回到信仰，教会将重新充满人。复兴之火将从大学校园开始燃起。」
prophecies.a_en: "A great spiritual awakening will sweep America. Young people will return to faith, churches will fill again. Revival fire will begin on college campuses."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年2月阿斯伯里大学爆发了持续两周的自发性校园复兴运动，吸引了全美关注和数万人参与。但这场运动的规模和持续性与「席卷美国」的大觉醒相比仍然有限。
prophecies.verdict_en: In February 2023, Asbury University experienced a two-week spontaneous campus revival that attracted national attention and tens of thousands of participants. But the movement's scale and duration were limited compared to a 'great awakening sweeping America'.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言自然灾害增多
prophecies.a: 「自然灾害将频繁发生——飓风、地震、洪水。大地在呻吟。这是末世的征兆。」
prophecies.a_en: "Natural disasters will occur frequently — hurricanes, earthquakes, floods. The earth groans. These are signs of the end times."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年代自然灾害确实频发——2024年美国经历了多次创纪录的飓风和山火。但将自然灾害归因于「末世征兆」而非气候变化是克莱门特独特的宗教解读。
prophecies.verdict_en: Natural disasters did increase in the 2020s — 2024 saw record hurricanes and wildfires in the US. However, attributing natural disasters to 'end-times signs' rather than climate change is Clement's unique religious interpretation.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言社交媒体审查
prophecies.a: 「大型科技公司将试图审查保守派的声音。他们将封禁领袖的账号。但被压制的声音将找到新的渠道。」
prophecies.a_en: "Big tech companies will try to censor conservative voices. They will ban leaders' accounts. But suppressed voices will find new channels."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2021年1月，Twitter和Facebook封禁了特朗普的账号。此后保守派用户大量迁移到Parler、Truth Social等替代平台。2022年马斯克收购Twitter（改名X）被视为恢复言论自由的举措。
prophecies.verdict_en: In January 2021, Twitter and Facebook banned Trump's accounts. Conservative users migrated en masse to alternative platforms like Parler and Truth Social. Musk's 2022 acquisition of Twitter (renamed X) was seen as restoring free speech.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言边境危机
prophecies.a: 「南方边境将出现危机。数百万人将涌入美国。这将成为国家安全威胁。」
prophecies.a_en: "A crisis will emerge at the southern border. Millions will flood into America. This will become a national security threat."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2021年起美国南部边境非法越境人数急剧增加。2023财年美墨边境逮捕人数超过240万（创纪录）。边境危机成为美国政治核心议题，也是2024年大选的关键辩题之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: Illegal border crossings surged from 2021. In fiscal year 2023, over 2.4 million arrests were made at the US-Mexico border (a record). The border crisis became a central US political issue and key debate topic in the 2024 election.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言美俄关系紧张
prophecies.a: 「俄罗斯将再次成为威胁。一个强人领袖将挑战西方。但战争将被避免。」
prophecies.a_en: "Russia will become a threat again. A strongman leader will challenge the West. But war will be avoided."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2022年2月俄罗斯入侵乌克兰，美俄关系降至冷战以来最低点。普京确实「挑战西方」。但美俄之间是否「避免了战争」存在不同解读——虽然没有直接军事冲突，但美国通过大规模军援深度介入。
prophecies.verdict_en: Russia invaded Ukraine in February 2022, dropping US-Russia relations to Cold War lows. Putin did 'challenge the West.' But whether 'war was avoided' between the US and Russia is debatable — no direct military conflict, but the US is deeply involved through massive military aid.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言阿富汗撤军
prophecies.a: 「美国将从一个中东国家仓促撤军。这将是一场耻辱。但上帝有更大的计划。」
prophecies.a_en: "America will hastily withdraw from a Middle Eastern country. It will be a disgrace. But God has a greater plan."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2021年8月美国从阿富汗仓促撤军，塔利班迅速夺取政权。喀布尔机场混乱场景震惊世界。13名美军士兵在撤退中阵亡。这被广泛认为是美国军事史上最具争议的撤退之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: In August 2021, the US hastily withdrew from Afghanistan as the Taliban swiftly seized power. Chaotic scenes at Kabul airport shocked the world. 13 US service members died during the withdrawal. This is widely considered one of the most controversial withdrawals in US military history.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言2020年大选争议
prophecies.a: 「2020年大选将充满争议和混乱。黑暗势力将试图窃取选举结果。但上帝的旨意终将实现。」
prophecies.a_en: "The 2020 election will be full of controversy and chaos. Dark forces will try to steal the election results. But God's will shall ultimately prevail."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年大选确实充满争议——特朗普拒绝承认败选，指控选举舞弊，引发1月6日国会大厦骚乱。但多次法庭审查和审计未发现大规模舞弊证据。「窃取选举」的说法缺乏司法支持。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 2020 election was indeed controversial — Trump refused to concede, alleged election fraud, triggering the January 6 Capitol riot. However, multiple court reviews and audits found no evidence of widespread fraud. The 'stolen election' claim lacks judicial support.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中明确提到了2020年
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement explicitly mentioned 2020 in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言通货膨胀
prophecies.a: 「物价将上涨。人们将为日常用品支付更多。但这是暂时的——经济将稳定下来。」
prophecies.a_en: "Prices will rise. People will pay more for everyday items. But this is temporary — the economy will stabilize."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2022年美国通胀率达到9.1%（40年最高）。食品、汽油和住房价格大幅上涨。美联储加息后通胀逐渐回落，2024年降至约3%。经济确实「稳定下来」但未完全恢复到疫情前水平。
prophecies.verdict_en: US inflation reached 9.1% in 2022 (40-year high). Food, gas, and housing prices surged. After Fed rate hikes, inflation gradually declined to about 3% in 2024. The economy did 'stabilize' but hasn't fully returned to pre-pandemic levels.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言媒体的重组
prophecies.a: 「主流媒体将经历重大变革。旧的媒体帝国将衰落，新的信息渠道将崛起。」
prophecies.a_en: "Mainstream media will undergo major transformation. Old media empires will decline, and new information channels will rise."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 传统媒体持续衰退——2023年多家美国媒体大规模裁员（CNN、NBC等）。Podcast、YouTube、独立媒体和社交平台（如Twitter/X）日益成为主要信息来源。传统电视新闻收视率持续下滑。
prophecies.verdict_en: Traditional media continued declining — multiple US media companies conducted massive layoffs in 2023 (CNN, NBC, etc.). Podcasts, YouTube, independent media, and social platforms (like Twitter/X) increasingly became primary information sources. Traditional TV news viewership continued falling.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言加密货币波动
prophecies.a: 「数字货币将经历巨大的起伏。许多人将因此致富，更多人将因此破产。不要将信任放在人造的货币上。」
prophecies.a_en: "Digital currencies will experience massive fluctuations. Many will become rich, more will go bankrupt. Do not place trust in man-made currency."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 比特币从2021年11月的近69000美元暴跌至2022年11月的约16000美元。FTX交易所崩溃导致数十亿美元损失。数百万投资者遭受巨额亏损，多个加密公司破产。
prophecies.verdict_en: Bitcoin crashed from nearly $69,000 in November 2021 to about $16,000 in November 2022. FTX exchange collapse caused billions in losses. Millions of investors suffered massive losses, and multiple crypto companies went bankrupt.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言教育体系变革
prophecies.a: 「学校将成为战场。家长将为孩子受到的教育内容而抗争。家庭教育和私立学校将大幅增长。」
prophecies.a_en: "Schools will become battlegrounds. Parents will fight over what their children are being taught. Homeschooling and private schools will grow dramatically."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2021-2023年美国各地爆发了关于学校课程内容的激烈争论——CRT（批判种族理论）、性别认同教育、图书馆书籍禁令等。家庭教育人数从2020年的约360万增至2023年的超过500万。「家长权利」运动成为政治热点。
prophecies.verdict_en: Fierce debates over school curricula erupted across the US in 2021-2023 — CRT, gender identity education, library book bans, etc. Homeschooled children grew from about 3.6 million in 2020 to over 5 million in 2023. The 'parents' rights' movement became a political flashpoint.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言房地产市场动荡
prophecies.a: 「房价将达到不可持续的高度。年轻人将买不起房子。但泡沫不会永远持续。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied real estate market turbulence
prophecies.a_en: "Home prices will reach unsustainable heights. Young people will be unable to buy houses. But the bubble won't last forever."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020-2022年美国房价中位数从约32万美元飙升至约45万美元。首次购房者面临前所未有的困难。美联储加息后市场有所降温，但2024年房价仍处于历史高位，泡沫尚未破裂。
prophecies.verdict_en: US median home prices surged from about $320,000 to about $450,000 from 2020-2022. First-time buyers faced unprecedented difficulties. The market cooled after Fed rate hikes, but prices remained near historic highs in 2024 — the bubble hasn't fully burst.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言特朗普2024年回归
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，他将回来。不是作为候选人，而是作为当选者。2024年将见证历史。」
prophecies.a_en: "God says, he will return. Not as a candidate, but as the winner. 2024 will witness history."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2024年11月5日，唐纳德·特朗普当选美国第47任总统，成为自格罗弗·克利夫兰以来第二位非连续任期的美国总统。他在选举人票和普选票中均获胜。
prophecies.verdict_en: On November 5, 2024, Donald Trump was elected the 47th President, becoming only the second US president to serve non-consecutive terms since Grover Cleveland. He won both the Electoral College and popular vote.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中明确提到了2024年
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement explicitly mentioned 2024 in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言特朗普将面临法律挑战
prophecies.a: 「他们将用法律武器攻击他。多项指控将被提出。但这一切都是政治迫害。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied legal challenges for Trump
prophecies.a_en: "They will attack him with legal weapons. Multiple charges will be filed. But all of this is political persecution."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年特朗普面临四项刑事起诉——曼哈顿封口费案、佛州机密文件案、联邦选举干预案和佐治亚州选举案。特朗普及其支持者确实将其定性为「政治迫害」，但这一定性存在争议。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2023, Trump faced four criminal indictments — the Manhattan hush money case, Florida classified documents case, federal election interference case, and Georgia election case. Trump and supporters did characterize these as 'political persecution,' but this characterization is disputed.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言以色列战争
prophecies.a: 「以色列将面临多方位的攻击。周围的敌人将同时行动。但以色列不会被消灭——上帝的手将保护她。」
prophecies.a_en: "Israel will face multi-front attacks. Surrounding enemies will act simultaneously. But Israel will not be destroyed — God's hand will protect her."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年10月7日哈马斯对以色列发动大规模突袭，造成约1200人死亡。此后黎巴嫩真主党、也门胡塞武装、伊朗等也对以色列发起攻击。以色列面临多线作战，但未被「消灭」。
prophecies.verdict_en: On October 7, 2023, Hamas launched a massive attack on Israel, killing about 1,200 people. Lebanese Hezbollah, Yemen's Houthis, and Iran also attacked Israel. Israel faced multi-front warfare but was not 'destroyed'.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言AI的崛起
prophecies.a: 「一种新的智能将被创造出来。它将模仿人类的思维，但没有灵魂。人们将被迫在真理和人造的智慧之间做出选择。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied the rise of AI
prophecies.a_en: "A new intelligence will be created. It will mimic human thinking but has no soul. People will be forced to choose between truth and man-made wisdom."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年ChatGPT引发AI革命，AI确实能「模仿人类的思维」。关于AI是否有意识（灵魂）的辩论激烈进行。但「在真理和人造智慧之间选择」是克莱门特独特的宗教框架解读。
prophecies.verdict_en: ChatGPT triggered an AI revolution in 2023; AI can indeed 'mimic human thinking.' Debates about whether AI has consciousness (soul) are intense. But 'choosing between truth and man-made wisdom' is Clement's unique religious framework interpretation.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言末世征兆加速
prophecies.a: 「末世的征兆正在加速出现。瘟疫、战争、饥荒、地震——所有耶稣预言的征兆都在同时发生。我们正处于历史的转折点。」
prophecies.a_en: "End-times signs are accelerating. Plague, war, famine, earthquakes — all signs Jesus prophesied are occurring simultaneously. We are at a turning point in history."
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言全球权力转移
prophecies.a: 「全球的权力格局正在改变。旧的联盟将瓦解，新的联盟将形成。美国的领导地位将受到挑战。」
prophecies.a_en: "The global power landscape is changing. Old alliances will crumble, new alliances will form. America's leadership will be challenged."
prophecies.verdict_zh: BRICS扩大（2024年新增沙特、伊朗、埃塞俄比亚等国）、中俄关系深化、全球去美元化趋势确实显示权力格局在变化。但美国仍是世界最大经济体和军事强国。
prophecies.verdict_en: BRICS expansion (adding Saudi Arabia, Iran, Ethiopia in 2024), deepening Sino-Russian ties, and global de-dollarization trends do show shifting power dynamics. But the US remains the world's largest economy and military power.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言国际冲突升级
prophecies.a: 「中东将燃起战火。多个国家卷入冲突。但不要恐惧——这是圣经预言的实现。」
prophecies.a_en: "War fires will burn in the Middle East. Multiple nations will be drawn into conflict. But do not fear — this is fulfillment of biblical prophecy."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年10月7日以色列-哈马斯战争爆发后，冲突扩大至加沙、黎巴嫩、也门和伊朗。2024年4月伊朗直接袭击以色列领土，为40多年来首次。中东确实「多个国家卷入冲突」。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the Israel-Hamas war erupted on October 7, 2023, conflict expanded to Gaza, Lebanon, Yemen, and Iran. Iran directly attacked Israeli territory in April 2024 for the first time in over 40 years. Multiple Middle Eastern nations were indeed 'drawn into conflict'.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言科技公司的衰落
prophecies.a: 「硅谷的巨人们将跌倒。大规模裁员将席卷科技行业。上帝正在重新排列权力的格局。」
prophecies.a_en: "Silicon Valley giants will fall. Mass layoffs will sweep the tech industry. God is rearranging the landscape of power."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2022-2023年科技行业经历了前所未有的大规模裁员。Meta裁员超过2万人，Amazon裁员2.7万人，Google裁员1.2万人，微软裁员1万人。仅2023年全球科技行业裁员超过26万人。
prophecies.verdict_en: The tech industry experienced unprecedented mass layoffs in 2022-2023. Meta laid off over 20,000, Amazon 27,000, Google 12,000, Microsoft 10,000. Over 260,000 tech workers were laid off globally in 2023 alone.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言反犹主义上升
prophecies.a: 「反犹主义将在全球抬头。犹太人将再次面临仇恨和暴力。但上帝的子民不会被消灭。」
prophecies.a_en: "Antisemitism will rise globally. Jewish people will face hatred and violence again. But God's people will not be destroyed."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年10月7日以色列-哈马斯战争后，全球反犹事件急剧增加。ADL报告2023年美国反犹事件增加约140%。欧洲多国也报告反犹犯罪显著上升。大学校园反犹抗议引发广泛争议。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the October 7, 2023 Israel-Hamas war, antisemitic incidents surged globally. ADL reported about 140% increase in US antisemitic incidents in 2023. Multiple European countries also reported significant rises. Campus antisemitic protests sparked widespread controversy.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该事件
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言超自然复兴
prophecies.a: 「超自然的复兴将在全球爆发。异象、异梦、神迹将大量出现。怀疑论者将被震惊。」
prophecies.a_en: "A supernatural revival will break out globally. Visions, dreams, and miracles will appear abundantly. Skeptics will be astonished."
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this timeframe in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言美元危机
prophecies.a: 「美元将面临前所未有的挑战。其他国家将试图摆脱美元的统治地位。但美国经济将经历转型并最终强大起来。」
prophecies.a_en: "The dollar will face unprecedented challenges. Other nations will try to escape dollar dominance. But the American economy will undergo transformation and ultimately grow stronger."
prophecies.verdict_zh: BRICS国家推动去美元化，中国和沙特达成人民币石油交易。但2024年美元仍占全球外汇储备的约58%，全球贸易的约40%使用美元结算。美元地位虽受挑战但并未崩溃。
prophecies.verdict_en: BRICS nations pushed de-dollarization, with China and Saudi Arabia making yuan-based oil deals. But in 2024, the dollar still accounts for about 58% of global forex reserves and about 40% of global trade settlements. Dollar dominance is challenged but hasn't collapsed.
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言第二任期改革
prophecies.a: 「在第二任期中，特朗普将对政府进行根本性改革。联邦机构将被重组。官僚体系将被精简。」
prophecies.a_en: "In his second term, Trump will fundamentally reform government. Federal agencies will be restructured. The bureaucracy will be streamlined."
prophecies.yearReason: 克莱门特在预言中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Clement described this period in his prophecies
